config.script:
#define FILTER_DO_WYDANIA 1 #define FILTER_DO_SPRZEDAZY 2
#define MODE_SPRZEDAZ_VS_WZ 1
dim g_nBaseTypeId : g_nBaseTypeId = clng(0) dim g_nIdObj : g_nIdObj = clng(0) dim g_strFilterMode : g_strFilterMode = "111111111111111"
dim g_nDisplayType : g_nDisplayType = clng(0) '-------------------------------------------------- 'public:funkcje do skonfigurowania z zewnątrz '-------------------------------------------------- function set_base_object(byval nTypeId,nIdObj) g_nBaseTypeId = nTypeId g_nIdObj = nIdObj end function
function set_filter_mode(strMode) g_strFilterMode = strMode end function
function set_display_type(nDisplayType) g_nDisplayType = nDisplayType
select case g_nDisplayType case MODE_SPRZEDAZ_VS_WZ page_.ctrl(CTRLID_FILTER_MODE).removeall page_.ctrl(CTRLID_FILTER_MODE).addnew(0,-1).text = "Do wydania" page_.ctrl(CTRLID_FILTER_MODE).addnew(0,-1).text = "Do zafakturowania" set_filter_mode "11" end select
end function '-------------------------------------------------- 'private:funkcje wewnętrzne '-------------------------------------------------- function c##CTRLID_FILTER_MODE##_ongetdata(byref oCtrl) oCtrl.value = g_strFilterMode end function
function c##CTRLID_FILTER_MODE##_ondataentered(byref oCtrl, byval newValue) : c##CTRLID_FILTER_MODE##_ondataentered = true g_strFilterMode = newValue end function
function frefresh trans_.discard dim pM60261 : set pM60261 = doc_.getmodule(60261) dim pDHMBalance : set pDHMBalance = pM60261.new_dhm_balance() dim pDokument : set pDokument = trans_.getobj(g_nBaseTypeId,g_nIdObj) if g_nBaseTypeId = TYPEID_N5SPRZEDAZ then pM60261.fill_dhm_balance_from_n5sprzedaz pDHMBalance,pDokument end if fill_results pDHMBalance page_.topelement.title = "Bilans dokumentu: " + pDokument.text end function
function fill_results(byref pDHMBalance) dim pTB : set pTB = doc_.afc.new_tb(nothing).attach(page_.ctrl(CTRLID_RESULT_TABLE)) pTB.section_head.removeall pTB.newrow pTB.newcell.addtext("Nazwa produktu").element.bold = true pTB.newcell.addtext("Nazwa opakowania").element.bold = true
select case g_nDisplayType case MODE_SPRZEDAZ_VS_WZ pTB.newcell.addtext("Ilość sprzedana").element.bold = true pTB.newcell.addtext("Ilość wydana").element.bold = true pTB.newcell.addtext("Do wydania").element.bold = true pTB.newcell.addtext("Do zafakturowania").element.bold = true end select pTB.section_body.removeall
dim iter dim pDHMBalanceItem for iter = 0 to pDHMBalance.get_count() - 1 set pDHMBalanceItem = pDHMBalance.get_pos(iter)
with pDHMBalanceItem if fill_row(pDHMBalanceItem,pTB) then pTB.row.bordercolor = rgb(255,255,255) if iter mod 2 = 0 then pTB.row.styleitem = STYLE_ROW_EVEN end if end if end with next end function
#macro ADDNUMBER_FROM_DHMBI(_col_) \ pTB.newcell.cell.align=ALIGN_RIGHT \ if pDHMBalanceItem.m_curValue(_col_) <> 0 then \ pTB.addtext doc_.afc.display.quantity(pDHMBalanceItem.m_curValue(_col_),pDHMBalanceItem.m_strUnit,pDHMBalanceItem.m_nPrecision) \ end if
function fill_row(byref pDHMBalanceItem,byref pTB) : fill_row = false
'==== filtrowanie ======
if mid(g_strFilterMode,FILTER_DO_WYDANIA,1) = "1" and pDHMBalanceItem.m_curValue(4) > 0.0 then fill_row = true end if if mid(g_strFilterMode,FILTER_DO_SPRZEDAZY,1) = "1" and pDHMBalanceItem.m_curValue(5) > 0.0 then fill_row = true end if
if not fill_row then exit function end if '==== ============ ======
pTB.newrow pTB.newcell.addtext pDHMBalanceItem.m_strProdNazwa pTB.newcell.addtext pDHMBalanceItem.m_strOpakNazwa
select case g_nDisplayType case MODE_SPRZEDAZ_VS_WZ
ADDNUMBER_FROM_DHMBI(0) ADDNUMBER_FROM_DHMBI(3) ADDNUMBER_FROM_DHMBI(4) ADDNUMBER_FROM_DHMBI(5) end select
fill_row = true end function
